checklist_items.purpose: Verify that future episode records carry required AG24F identity, series, source, risk, navigation and production-control fields.
Verify that every future episode maps to a valid AG24C reserved slot and AG24G index entry.
Verify AG24B strong_series_candidate decision and score 25+ before topic use.
Verify two-reference target, source status, reachable links and under-editorial-verification handling.
Block unsupported breaking-news, medical, legal, political, spiritual or scriptural claims.
Verify sensitivity, repetition and category-specific caution fields.
Verify Tuesday Learning, Friday World Lens and Sunday Deep Read lane fit.
Verify previous/next episode fields and non-public navigation state.
Verify object-rich readiness without breaking article readability or mobile layout.
Verify public_visibility=false, publish_approved=false and article_generation_allowed=false until later approval.
Verify AG24H conveyor stages remain gated and no queue mutation occurs without later activation.
Verify Supabase/Auth/backend remains deferred under the hybrid staged path.
